series_metadata.series_description: This record series is comprised of monthly and yearly statistical information collected and distributed to counties and taxing districts. The report (source and distribution of taxes) contains the description - registrations, total registrations, transfers, conversions and add weight, replacement and duplicates, total tax collected, less cost, tax to be distributed, plus interest earned, total amount distributed, month and year-to-date totals for taxing district, counties, county roads, and township roads. The printouts for commercial registrations contain the type of registration (commercial trucks and trailers) and different weight classes, this year and last year broken down by month and year-to-date - units, license tax and permissive tax. These reports were created in January 1984 for informing the taxing district officials on statistical information.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: ; Microform: Records generated 1/1989 - 11/2005 are on microfiche; January through November original copy ODPS Record Center off-site storage ; Electronic: Records generated 11/2005 are put on CDs and sent ODPS Record Center off site storage
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Recycle ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
